I'm a kid and I really like dinosaurs and playing tag outside with my friends, and I have a big blue backpack for school!
I want to be a big dinosaur because then I could stomp around really loud and have a super long tail, and I wouldn't have to go to bed when it gets dark!
I'm a kid! I like playing tag outside and eating chocolate cookies, and I have a really cool dinosaur toy that sleeps in my bed every night.
I wish I could be a big, fluffy dragon so I could fly way up high in the clouds and breathe out sparkly fire, and then I could find a giant mountain of chocolate cookies to eat for snack time!

I wish I was at the park right now so I could go on the super fast slide and swing really high until my toes touch the clouds, and then I'd get a big strawberry popsicle!

I don't really hate anyone, but I really, really don't like it when my mommy says "no" to extra cookies or when my brother takes my favorite toys without asking!
I listen to my mommy and my daddy because they tell me what to do, but I also listen to the music on the radio because it makes me want to dance really fast!

I really, really love my fuzzy teddy bear because he hugs me when I'm scared of the dark, and I also love eating chocolate ice cream with sprinkles on top! I want to be a dinosaur when I grow up and I hope we can go to the park to go on the big swings today.
I love playing outside with my friends in the grass, eating chocolate ice cream with extra sprinkles, and when my mommy reads me stories before I go to sleep!
I really, really hate it when my mom says it's bedtime because I want to keep playing with my dinosaurs, and I also hate broccoli because it tastes like tiny trees and it's super yucky!
I really, really want a big chocolate cookie and maybe some juice, and can we go outside to play on the swings right now?

I really, really love playing outside with my friends and running super fast until I get all out of breath! I also love eating yummy chocolate cookies and drawing big dinosaurs with my favorite crayons, and sometimes I just want to jump on the couch and watch cartoons all day long.
I love playing outside in the grass with my dog and running really, really fast until I get super tired, and then my mommy lets me have a big scoop of chocolate ice cream for a snack!
I really, really hate when my mommy makes me eat broccoli because it tastes like grass and it's super yucky, and I also hate taking baths when I'm having so much fun playing with my Legos!

I'm scared of the monsters that hide under my bed and the spooky shadows on my wall when the lights go out, but mostly I just get scared of the loud thunder noises when it rains really hard outside!
I'm not angry at anybody right now because I'm busy playing with my blocks, but sometimes I get super mad at my big brother because he always takes my favorite blue truck without asking!
I'm super happy with my bestest friend Leo because we get to play tag and share my yummy cookies, and my mommy makes me feel happy too when she gives me big hugs!
I'm not sad at anyone, I'm just feeling a little bit lonely because I want to go outside and play on the swings right now.

I'm scared of the monsters that hide under my bed when the lights go out and the shadows on my wall look like big scary claws, and sometimes I get worried about getting lost or what happens if I have to go to the dentist because they have those loud scary tools.

I'm super happy because I get to have chocolate ice cream for a snack and my mommy said we can go to the park later to go on the big swings!

I'm sad because my ice cream fell on the sidewalk and it got all gooey and messy, and now I can't eat it anymore. Also, my mommy said I have to go to bed soon and I'm not finished playing with my dinosaurs yet.
I'm really scared of the dark because I think there might be monsters hiding under my bed or in the closet, and sometimes the shadows look like big scary faces.

I love playing outside in the grass and running super fast until I get all tired, and then I get to eat a big yummy cookie with extra sprinkles on top!

I love being me because I get to play with my toys and run really fast in the grass! Sometimes I get in trouble for making a mess, but it’s super fun to imagine I’m a superhero or a dinosaur, and I like my mommy's hugs the bestest ever!
